data.name: Nargs
data.value: Represents a constraint on the number of argument values accepted by a parameter.

data.name: List
data.value: Indicates that the argument is a comma-separated list

data.name: Type
data.value: Generates completion candidates based on this type. Avairables: - `File': Completes the path of a file or directory - `Directory`: Completes the path of a directory

data.name: Script
data.value: Script for dynamically generating autocomplete candidates
